This is a new blog post 2026-02-11

February 10, 2026  ·  #blog

Well, I'm learning about bash and git and branches and push and pull and ... I finally lost some work with git. I guess its a right of passage. It's cool, I'm gonna rewrite what I had in a different way. So it's a force iteration

Still loving the Olympics and all it's weirdness.

And the recipe I'm loving is a Crab Mac and Cheese - it's so good reheated in the oven. I pop it in with a meat thermometer and when I hear that alarm, it's time to eat

I'm lookin over at my posts and can imagine that it's going to grow and grow. Is there a way to archive it? I look at that month of posts as short term memory. Is there a way to 'archive' or move to long term memory. How exactly does an RSS feed work? is every single post in the rss.xml file?

hmmmm. seems like I should know.
